name: Super Nacho
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup chopped onions (may be cooked with ground beef)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2 Lightly oil a shallow baking dish, approximately 11 x 15 inches.
3 Spread beans and add other ingredients in order given (ground beef, taco seasoning, onions, taco sauce, jalapeno peppers, Monterey Jack cheese, Cheddar cheese, and olives), combining cheese, ending with ripe olives.
4 Bake in the oven until bubbly.
5 Make a ring of avocado dip on top of nacho.
6 Center with sour cream and sprinkle on green onions and green peppers.
7 Dip with large corn chips or tortillas.
